# Jersey Jumpy - Complete Business Information

## About Jersey Jumpy

Jersey Jumpy (JerseyJumpy.com LLC) is a family owned and operated bounce house, inflatable slide, obstacle course, and combo bouncer rental company that has been serving all of New Jersey since 2007. We provide premium inflatable rentals for birthday parties, festivals, fundraisers, sales promotions, carnivals, school field days, corporate events, and more.

We are fully licensed and registered with the New Jersey Department of Community Affairs (NJ DCA), SIOTO (Safe Inflatable Operators Training Organization) certified, and fully insured.

Our motto: Good. Clean. Fun.

## Contact Information

- **Toll Free:** 866-597-6625
- **Local:** 732-750-8810
- **Email:** info@jerseyjumpy.com
- **Mailing Address:** PO Box 217, Iselin, NJ 08830
- **Website:** https://jerseyjumpy.com
- **Booking Page:** https://jerseyjumpy.com/contact

## Service Area

Jersey Jumpy serves the entire state of New Jersey. Pricing may vary by location due to delivery distance.

## Inflatable Categories

### Bounce Houses (13x13)
Standard 13-foot by 13-foot bounce houses. Great for younger children and smaller spaces. Starting at $350.

### Castle Bouncers
Larger castle-themed bounce houses with turrets and themed designs. Great for birthday parties and events.

### Combo Bouncers
Multi-feature inflatables that combine bouncing areas with slides, basketball hoops, climbing walls, and sometimes pools. Starting at $425.

### Wet/Dry Slides
Single and dual lane slides available in 18-foot, 20-foot, and 22-foot heights. Can be used dry or with water and pool attachments during summer months. Starting at $425 dry, $550+ wet with pool.

### Obstacle Courses
40-foot, 50-foot, and 65-foot obstacle courses with tunnels, climbing walls, and slides. Great for school field days, corporate events, and competitive fun. Starting at $600.

## Pricing

All prices include delivery, professional setup, and same-day pickup within the service area. Prices shown are starting rates and may vary by location.

| Inflatable Type | Starting Price |
|---|---|
| 13x13 Jumpy | $350 |
| 15x15 Jumpy | $375 |
| 20x20 Jumpy | $450 |
| 4-1 Combo | $425 |
| 4-1 Combo with Pool | $550 |
| 5-1 Combo | $475 |
| 18' Single Lane Dry Slide | $425 |
| 18' Single Lane Wet Slide with Pool | $600 |
| 18' Dual Lane Dry Slide | $550 |
| 18' Dual Lane Wet Slide with Pool | $700 |
| 20' Dual Lane Dry Slide | $675 |
| 20' Dual Lane Wet Slide with Pool | $800 |
| 22' Dry Slide | $700 |
| 40' Obstacle Course | $600 |
| 50' Obstacle Course | $700 |
| 65' Obstacle Course | $800 |

### Additional Services

| Service | Price | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Generator Rental | $100 | Required if no power outlet within 100 feet |
| Attendants | $35/hour | Professional supervision for your event |

### What's Included in Every Rental
- Free delivery
- Professional setup
- Safety instructions
- Same-day pickup
- Full insurance coverage
- Clean, sanitized equipment
- Extension cords
- Blower included

### Deposit & Payment
- A deposit is required to secure your rental date
- Remaining balance is due on the day of the event
- Standard rental includes up to 8 hours of use
- Extended hours may be available upon request

## Party Packages

Party packages bundle multiple inflatables together for larger events at a discounted rate. Packages range from approximately $1,300 to $2,200 and are ideal for school field days, corporate events, and large birthday parties.

To view current packages and pricing, visit: https://jerseyjumpy.com/party-packages

Custom packages can be created to match your event size, budget, and preferences. Call 866-597-6625 to discuss options.

## Safety Policies

### Adult Supervision
A responsible adult (18+) must supervise all inflatable activities at all times. The supervising adult is responsible for enforcing safety rules and capacity limits.

### Safety Rules
1. Remove shoes, glasses, jewelry, and sharp objects before entering
2. No food, drinks, gum, or candy inside the inflatable
3. No roughhousing, flips, wrestling, or climbing on walls
4. No silly string, confetti, or paint near the inflatable
5. Keep the entrance clear at all times
6. Do not hang on the netting or entrance
7. Exit feet first only
8. No water on dry inflatables (unless specifically designed for water use)

### Capacity Guidelines
- **Ages 2-4:** Requires constant adult supervision. Smaller children should play separately from larger children.
- **Ages 4-7:** Adult supervision required at all times. Mix of ages should be monitored carefully.
- **Ages 7-10:** Adult supervision recommended. Follow capacity limits strictly.
- **Ages 10+:** Responsible adult nearby. Weight limits apply to all participants.

Specific capacity limits vary by inflatable. Check each unit's specifications for exact numbers.

### Weather Policy
- **Rain:** Rental must be postponed or cancelled
- **High Winds (15+ mph):** Inflatables must be deflated immediately
- **Lightning/Thunder:** All participants must exit immediately
- **Extreme Heat:** Provide shade and hydration breaks

### Setup Requirements
- Clear space: Ensure adequate clearance around the inflatable (typically 3-5 feet on all sides)
- Level surface: Setup area must be relatively flat on grass or pavement (no slopes or uneven ground)
- Power access: Dedicated 20-amp outlet within 100 feet required (generator rental available for $100)

### Rental Agreement
All rentals require a signed rental agreement acknowledging safety policies, including:
- Providing adult supervision at all times
- Enforcing all safety rules with participants
- Not exceeding capacity limits
- Ceasing use during inclement weather
- Accepting responsibility for damage beyond normal wear

## Certifications

### NJ Department of Community Affairs (NJ DCA)
Jersey Jumpy is fully licensed and registered with the New Jersey Department of Community Affairs. All inflatables meet state safety standards and are inspected annually. NJ state law requires DCA registration for amusement ride operators.

### SIOTO (Safe Inflatable Operators Training Organization)
Our team has completed comprehensive training through SIOTO, the industry leader in inflatable safety education. This certification ensures we follow best practices for setup, operation, and supervision.

### Insurance
We carry comprehensive general liability insurance to protect you and your guests.

### Our Safety Commitment
- **Annual Inspections:** All equipment is inspected annually by certified inspectors and maintained to the highest standards
- **Clean Equipment:** Every inflatable is thoroughly cleaned and sanitized before and after each rental
- **Professional Setup:** Our trained technicians handle all delivery, setup, and anchoring to ensure safe operation
- **Quality Materials:** We use only commercial-grade inflatables made with lead-free, fire-retardant vinyl
- **Safety Instructions:** We provide detailed safety guidelines and instructions with every rental

## Booking Process

1. **Browse inventory** at https://jerseyjumpy.com/inflatables or call 866-597-6625
2. **Request a quote** at https://jerseyjumpy.com/contact with your event date, time, location, and preferred inflatable
3. **Receive confirmation** - we typically respond within 24 hours
4. **Pay deposit** to secure your date
5. **Event day** - we deliver, set up, and provide safety instructions. Pay remaining balance.
6. **Pickup** - we return the same day to deflate and pick up the equipment

## Why Choose Jersey Jumpy

- Family-owned and operated since 2007
- NJ DCA certified and SIOTO trained
- Fully insured for your peace of mind
- Professional delivery, setup, and pickup included
- Clean, sanitized equipment for every rental
- Commercial-grade, lead-free, fire-retardant inflatables
- Serving all of New Jersey
- Wide selection of bounce houses, slides, combos, and obstacle courses
- Party packages available for larger events
- Custom packages available upon request
